meaning: adj.内陆的,国内的adv.在内地,向内地n.内地
examples: The vast majority live further inland.
The town lies a few kilometres inland.
We travelled further inland the next day.
The inland sky above Boonville is powder-blue as I enter the Mendocino Fairgrounds for the annual Floyd R.
The infestation flustered fishermen on the Illinois, 100 years ago the largest inland fishery in America.
